parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { if (!$json.symbol) return '{}'; return JSON.stringify({ symbol: $json.symbol, action: $json.action, side: $json.side, quantity: $json.quantity, price: $json.price, tradelocker_order_id: $json.tradelocker_order_id, tradelocker_position_id: $json.tradelocker_position_id, position_status: $json.position_status, status: $json.status, champion_model_id: $json.champion_model_id, error_message: $json.error_message, executed_at: $json.executed_at }); })() }}
